---
title: "Practical Program Evaluation Chapter Map"
description: "Full reading map for Practical Program Evaluation chapter notes."
book_id: "practical-program-evaluation"
collection_id: "evaluation-texts"
note_type: "Map"
citation_key: "chen_2015_practical_program_evaluation"
evidence_ids:
  - "chunk:practical-program-evaluation:ch01-a-fundamental-evaluation-typology:c0001"
  - "table_segment:practical-program-evaluation:table:2.1:s001"
  - "chunk:practical-program-evaluation:ch03-logic-models-and-the-action-model-change-model-schema-program-theory:c0001"
  - "chunk:practical-program-evaluation:ch04-the-program-plan-program-scope-and-action-plan:c0001"
  - "chunk:practical-program-evaluation:ch05-the-action-model-framework-and-the-action-plan:c0003"
  - "chunk:practical-program-evaluation:ch06-constructive-process-evaluation-tailored-for-the-initial-implementation:c0001"
  - "chunk:practical-program-evaluation:ch07-assessing-implementation-in-the-mature-implementation-stage:c0001"
  - "chunk:practical-program-evaluation:ch08-what-is-program-monitoring:c0001"
  - "chunk:practical-program-evaluation:ch09-constructive-outcome-evaluation:c0002"
  - "chunk:practical-program-evaluation:ch10-the-experimentation-evaluation-approach-to-outcome-evaluation:c0001"
  - "chunk:practical-program-evaluation:ch11-the-holistic-effectuality-approach-s-conceptualization-of-outcome-evaluation:c0001"
  - "chunk:practical-program-evaluation:ch12-the-theory-driven-approach-to-outcome-evaluation:c0001"
  - "chunk:practical-program-evaluation:ch13-what-to-do-if-your-logic-model-does-not-work-as-well-as-expected:c0001"
  - "chunk:practical-program-evaluation:ch14-efforts-to-clarify-the-change-model-and-action-model-in-program-theory:c0001"
  - "chunk:practical-program-evaluation:ch15-integrative-cogency-model-the-integrated-evaluation-perspective:c0001"
source_status: "needs_review"
---

## Source

This map uses selected MCP research-library sections from *Practical Program Evaluation* [@chen_2015_practical_program_evaluation].

## Reading Route

### Foundations

- [Chapter 1: Fundamentals of Program Evaluation](chapter-01-fundamentals-of-program-evaluation.qmd) - pages 23-56; `Chapter 1: Fundamentals of Program Evaluation`
- [Chapter 2: Understand Approaches to Evaluation and Select Ones That Work: The Comprehensive Evaluation Typology](chapter-02-understand-approaches-to-evaluation-and-select-ones-that-work.qmd) - pages 57-78; `Chapter 2: Understand Approaches to Evaluation and Select Ones That Work: the Comprehensive Evaluation Typology`
- [Chapter 3: Logic Models and the Action Model/Change Model Schema (Program Theory)](chapter-03-logic-models-and-the-action-model-change-model-schema.qmd) - pages 79-114; `Chapter 3: Logic Models and the Action Model/change Model Schema (program Theory)`

### Planning

- [Chapter 4: Helping Stakeholders Clarify a Program Plan: Program Scope](chapter-04-helping-stakeholders-clarify-a-program-plan-program-scope.qmd) - pages 117-137; `Chapter 4: Helping Stakeholders Clarify a Program Plan: Program Scope`
- [Chapter 5: Helping Stakeholders Clarify a Program Plan: Action Plan](chapter-05-helping-stakeholders-clarify-a-program-plan-action-plan.qmd) - pages 139-171; `Chapter 5: Helping Stakeholders Clarify a Program Plan: Action Plan`

### Implementation and Monitoring

- [Chapter 6: Constructive Process Evaluation Tailored for the Initial Implementation](chapter-06-constructive-process-evaluation-tailored-for-initial-implementation.qmd) - pages 174-196; `Chapter 6: Constructive Process Evaluation Tailored for the Initial Implementation`
- [Chapter 7: Assessing Implementation in the Mature Implementation Stage](chapter-07-assessing-implementation-in-the-mature-implementation-stage.qmd) - pages 197-220; `Chapter 7: Assessing Implementation in the Mature Implementation Stage`
- [Chapter 8: Program Monitoring and the Development of a Monitoring System](chapter-08-program-monitoring-and-the-development-of-a-monitoring-system.qmd) - pages 223-250; `Chapter 8: Program Monitoring and the Development of a Monitoring System`

### Outcome Evaluation

- [Chapter 9: Constructive Outcome Evaluations](chapter-09-constructive-outcome-evaluations.qmd) - pages 252-267; `Chapter 9: Constructive Outcome Evaluations`
- [Chapter 10: The Experimentation Evaluation Approach to Outcome Evaluation](chapter-10-the-experimentation-evaluation-approach-to-outcome-evaluation.qmd) - pages 268-280; `Chapter 10: The Experimentation Evaluation Approach to Outcome Evaluation`
- [Chapter 11: The Holistic Effectuality Evaluation Approach to Outcome Evaluation](chapter-11-the-holistic-effectuality-evaluation-approach-to-outcome-evaluation.qmd) - pages 283-324; `Chapter 11: The Holistic Effectuality Evaluation Approach to Outcome Evaluation`
- [Chapter 12: The Theory-driven Approach to Outcome Evaluation](chapter-12-the-theory-driven-approach-to-outcome-evaluation.qmd) - pages 325-360; `Chapter 12: The Theory-driven Approach to Outcome Evaluation`

### Advanced Issues and Dissemination

- [Chapter 13: What to Do If Your Logic Model Does Not Work as Well as Expected](chapter-13-what-to-do-if-your-logic-model-does-not-work-as-well-as-expected.qmd) - pages 364-385; `Chapter 13: What to Do If Your Logic Model Does Not Work as Well as Expected`
- [Chapter 14: Formal Theories versus Stakeholder Theories in Interventions: Relative Strengths and Limitations](chapter-14-formal-theories-versus-stakeholder-theories-in-interventions.qmd) - pages 387-410; `Chapter 14: Formal Theories versus Stakeholder Theories in Interventions: Relative Strengths and Limitations`
- [Chapter 15: Evaluation and Dissemination: Top-down Approach versus Bottom-up Approach](chapter-15-evaluation-and-dissemination-top-down-approach-versus-bottom-up-approach.qmd) - pages 413-432; `Chapter 15: Evaluation and Dissemination: Top-down Approach versus Bottom-up Approach`

## How to Use This Map

- Start with Chapters 1-3 to select the evaluation route and clarify program theory.
- Use Chapters 4-5 when the program is still being planned and needs program-scope or action-plan work.
- Use Chapters 6-8 for early implementation, mature implementation, and monitoring-system questions.
- Use Chapters 9-12 for outcome readiness, causal rigor, real-world effectuality, and theory-driven explanation.
- Use Chapters 13-15 when logic models, theory sources, or dissemination assumptions need more advanced treatment.

## Legacy Extracts

- [Evaluation Design and Its Components](section-01-evaluation-design-components.qmd)
- [Logic Models and the Action Model/Change Model Schema](section-02-logic-models-and-program-theory.qmd)
- [When Logic Models Do Not Work as Expected](section-03-logic-model-limits.qmd)

## Source Records

<details class="source-chunks">
<summary>Source records</summary>
<ul class="source-chunk-list">
<li><code>chunk:practical-program-evaluation:ch01-a-fundamental-evaluation-typology:c0001</code></li>
<li><code>table_segment:practical-program-evaluation:table:2.1:s001</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:practical-program-evaluation:ch03-logic-models-and-the-action-model-change-model-schema-program-theory:c0001</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:practical-program-evaluation:ch04-the-program-plan-program-scope-and-action-plan:c0001</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:practical-program-evaluation:ch05-the-action-model-framework-and-the-action-plan:c0003</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:practical-program-evaluation:ch06-constructive-process-evaluation-tailored-for-the-initial-implementation:c0001</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:practical-program-evaluation:ch07-assessing-implementation-in-the-mature-implementation-stage:c0001</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:practical-program-evaluation:ch08-what-is-program-monitoring:c0001</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:practical-program-evaluation:ch09-constructive-outcome-evaluation:c0002</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:practical-program-evaluation:ch10-the-experimentation-evaluation-approach-to-outcome-evaluation:c0001</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:practical-program-evaluation:ch11-the-holistic-effectuality-approach-s-conceptualization-of-outcome-evaluation:c0001</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:practical-program-evaluation:ch12-the-theory-driven-approach-to-outcome-evaluation:c0001</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:practical-program-evaluation:ch13-what-to-do-if-your-logic-model-does-not-work-as-well-as-expected:c0001</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:practical-program-evaluation:ch14-efforts-to-clarify-the-change-model-and-action-model-in-program-theory:c0001</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:practical-program-evaluation:ch15-integrative-cogency-model-the-integrated-evaluation-perspective:c0001</code></li>
</ul>
</details>

## References
